description_long: This object consists of three distinct bread rolls arranged side by side. The leftmost roll is oval-shaped with a light brown crust and a prominent central score, dusted lightly with flour. The middle roll is round, with a smooth, golden-brown surface and a subtle dusting of flour, giving it a soft, pillowy appearance. The rightmost roll is darker, almost chocolate brown, with a deep central score and a slightly rougher, rustic texture. Each roll displays a unique crust pattern, ranging from smooth to deeply scored, and the surfaces show natural variations in color and flour dusting. The breads appear fresh and artisanal, suitable for display in a bakery or urban food market setting.
description: A group of three artisanal bread rolls, each with distinct shapes and crust textures, ranging from light to dark brown and featuring flour dusting and scoring.
description_view_0: Three bread rolls are seen from the front, showing their distinct shapes: oval with a score (left), round and smooth (center), and dark with a deep score (right).
description_view_1: The breads are viewed from an angle, highlighting the side profiles and the thickness of the crusts, especially the dark roll in the foreground.
description_view_2: The breads are seen from the back, emphasizing the roundness of the center roll and the scored tops of the left and right rolls.
description_view_3: The breads are viewed from the opposite angle, showing the side of the oval roll with its deep score and the rounded back of the center roll.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crusts display a variety of patterns: the left and right rolls have deep central scores, with the left roll lightly dusted with flour, while the center roll is smooth and round with a subtle, even flour dusting and no visible scoring.
